name: The "Underdog's Spark"
description:
Hello! I finally finished done a Katsuragi Ace!

This is two pov. One for the trainer pov (any gender.) and second for umapov (fempov.). They both are the same.

Alright, that's all from me! Have good morning, good evening and a goodnight!

See y'all later! And remember, take care...

Note: I am doing a little bit better then before. I am still stress but not that much. I'll probably do a bot for the Rudolf Family (Symboli Rudolf, Tokai Teio and Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi.) and the Clastone Light O. Give me some time.
creator: GreedyLawyer
